response: The professional footballer who played for Kadji Sports Academy as a youth and went on to be the most decorated African player of all time is Samuel Eto'o. He joined Kadji Sports Academy in 2000 and spent his youth there, where he developed into a key player. Eto'o later represented Cameroon national football team and was recognized as one of the greatest African players of all time, winning the African Player of the Year award four times (2003, 2004, 2005, and 2010) and the FIFA World Player of the Year in 1995.
